function.name: shell_command
function.description: Run a local shell command in the task workspace. Use for system commands, tests, build steps, git inspection, and small scripted probes. Prefer read-only commands unless edits are required by the user.

workdir.description: Working directory. Relative paths are resolved against GA temp cwd.

login.description: Reserved for Codex compatibility. Ignored by this runtime.

function.name: code_run
function.description: Run Python or a shell snippet. Prefer `shell_command` for ordinary shell commands and `code_run` for Python probes or generated scripts.

script.description: Code or command text. If omitted, a reply code block may be used.

cwd.description: Working directory, defaults to GA cwd.

inline_eval.description: Internal debug mode; do not use unless explicitly requested.

function.name: file_read
function.description: Read a file with optional line numbers. Read before modifying files so edits are based on the latest content.

name: apply_patch
description: Apply a Codex-style patch. The input must be a complete patch beginning with *** Begin Patch and ending with *** End Patch. Use this for precise edits.

function.name: file_patch
function.description: Replace one unique old_content block with new_content. Exact whitespace match is required. Prefer apply_patch for code edits.

old_content.description: Original text block. Must be unique.

function.name: file_write
function.description: Create, overwrite, append, or prepend files. Use only for large whole-file writes. Put intended content in the assistant message body before calling.

function.name: web_scan
function.description: Read simplified HTML/text from the current real Chrome tab or list/switch tabs. Use after navigation or when page state is unclear.

text_only.description: Return plain text instead of simplified HTML.

function.name: web_execute_js
function.description: Execute JavaScript in the user's real Chrome session. Use for precise DOM/CDP operations. Do not read unrelated cookies, tokens, or account data.

script.description: JavaScript code or path to a script file.

save_to_file.description: Optional output path for long returned data.

no_monitor.description: Skip page-change monitoring for read-only operations.

switch_tab_id.description: Optional tab id to activate before execution.

function.name: update_working_checkpoint
function.description: Update short-term working memory injected into later turns. Store verified constraints, file paths, failures, decisions, progress, and next steps.

key_info.description: Concise current task state, under about 200 tokens.

related_sop.description: Relevant SOP or memory file names to reread if useful.

function.name: ask_user
function.description: Interrupt the task to ask the user when a decision, credential, missing input, or real blocker prevents safe progress.

function.name: start_long_term_update
function.description: Start GA's long-term memory distillation when verified durable facts or reusable SOPs should be preserved. Skip for transient details and secrets.
